\tzpentry{ID3359}{Mode Frequency Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3359 introduces Mode Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \omega_ \pm = \frac{ \omega_c + \omega_e}{2} \pm \frac{ \sqrt{( \omega_c - \omega_e)^2 + 4 \Omega^2}}{2} \end{equation}
